title: LED Driver Price in Pakistan 2026 — Constant Current vs Constant Voltage Complete Buyer Guide
title_tag: LED Driver Price in Pakistan 2026 — CC vs CV Buyer Guide
description_tag: LED driver price in Pakistan 2026. Constant current vs constant voltage, dimmable, waterproof IP67. Full PKR price matrix + wattage calculator + installation guide.
summary_html: Complete LED driver buying guide for Pakistan 2026. Constant current vs constant voltage explained, IP rating selection, dimmability types (TRIAC/0-10V/DALI), wattage derating for 50°C ambient, and full PKR price matrix from 12W to 320W with IEC standards checklist.
